channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Prince Louis Shows Off His Sporty Side in Beachy Birthday Video: '8 Is Great!'
item.description: The young royal played cricket, jumped into the sea and ran fast in the footage filmed during a family vacation in Cornwall

item.title: Where Is Brooke Hogan’s Ex-Boyfriend Yannique Barker Now? Inside His Life Today
item.description: Yannique Barker was the subject of racist comments from Brooke's dad, Hulk Hogan, which were leaked in 2015

item.title: How Did Hulk Hogan Die? Inside the WWE Star's Quiet Health Struggles at the End of His Life
item.description: Twelve-time world champion wrestler Hulk Hogan died in July 2025

item.title: How Tall Are Your Favorite Celebrities? Learn the Surprising Heights of These 30 Stars
item.description: From Dwayne Johnson to Taylor Swift to Simone Biles, find out how tall many actors, musicians and athletes are — and what some have said about their s...

item.title: I Walked 20,000+ Steps Ache-Free in These Adidas Sneakers at Tokyo Disney — Grab a Pair on Sale at Amazon Right Now
item.description: Jessica Alba has worn these exact platform shoes, too

item.title: 'Superman' Production Upsets Atlanta Prisoners Over Alleged Security Restrictions

item.title: Viral Creepy Doorbell Guy Officially Charged, Bail Increases to $250K

item.title: Gigi Hadid Hot Shots to Kick Off Her 31st Birthday!

item.title: Patriots Coach Mike Vrabel Seeking Counseling Amid Russini Scandal, To Miss Part of Draft
item.description: New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel is seeking counseling amid his tawdry scandal involving former Athletics journalist Dianna Russini. In a statem...

item.title: Trump DHS Official Reportedly Bilked 'Sugar Daddy' Out of $40K
item.description: A Trump Administration counterterrorism official has reportedly been put on ice after she allegedly scammed her ex-boyfriend out of $40,000 during the...
